title: Golden Crispy Chinese Cherry Tomatoes Jiaozi
description: A halal-friendly Chinese dish featuring crispy jiaozi filled with cherry tomatoes and served with a savory umami sauce, perfect for a rainy day. The al-dente finish of the cherry tomatoes adds a delightful texture to the dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together halved cherry tomatoes, soy sauce, oyster sauce, and sesame oil.
Lay a wonton wrapper on a flat surface and place a tablespoon of the cherry tomato mixture in the center.
Dip your finger in a small amount of water and run it along the edges of the wonton wrapper.
Fold the wonton wrapper into a triangle by bringing the two opposite corners together to form a point.
Press the edges together to seal the jiaozi.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add the jiaozi and fry until they are golden brown and crispy.
Remove the jiaozi from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the jiaozi hot with chopped scallions and grated ginger on top.
